title: C00 and C01 lacked normative phase coverage
repair_summary: Rule-level phase audit; explicit C00/C01 and ALL_PHASES coverage.
closure_condition: Phase coverage tests and PDF/catalog equivalence pass.

title: Bootstrap lacked complete source precedence and companion identity
affected_surfaces: Base PDF; Personal PDF; README; CORE_CANON
repair_summary: Added exact precedence, companion names, hash behavior, and reference-only status.

title: Branching statement was ambiguous
repair_summary: Separated release-lineage branching from intra-cycle branching.

title: Executable surface terminology was ambiguous
repair_summary: Changed to machine-interpretable declarative execution surface and stated no program code.
closure_condition: Formulation migration and terminology tests pass.

title: Oper, Operature, Operome, and InterfaceMachine were not closed in PDF terminology
repair_summary: Added canonical definitions and named destinations.
closure_condition: Lexicon parity and destination tests pass.

title: Base/Personal PDF precedence was implicit
repair_summary: Added explicit layer precedence and conflict contract.

title: Single Base PDF could be mistaken for a complete boot package
repair_summary: Added REFERENCE_ONLY and STOP-PACKAGE-INCOMPLETE when loaded alone.

title: PDF accessibility and font embedding incomplete
repair_summary: Embedded fonts and kept 9 pt minimum; PDF/UA remains not claimed.
closure_condition: Font and geometry checks pass; PDF/UA remains debt.

title: Full v2.21 transport was blocked by current substrate
repair_summary: Split one release into boot package and assurance companion; transport acceptance remains unproven.
closure_condition: Exact boot and companion files must be accepted by target substrate.
